# Add External Calendar Integrations

## Description
Integrate with external calendar services like Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar to sync events and provide a unified family calendar experience.

## Use Case
A family can sync their existing Google Calendar events with the family calendar, and the AI agent can access and manage events across all connected calendars.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Google Calendar integration
- [ ] Outlook/Office 365 integration
- [ ] Apple Calendar integration
- [ ] Two-way sync for events
- [ ] Conflict resolution for overlapping events
- [ ] Privacy controls for shared data
- [ ] Support for multiple calendar accounts

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement Google Calendar API integration
- [ ] Add Microsoft Graph API for Outlook
- [ ] Create calendar sync service
- [ ] Handle authentication for external services
- [ ] Implement conflict detection and resolution
- [ ] Add sync status monitoring

## Implementation Notes
- Use OAuth 2.0 for external service authentication
- Implement incremental sync for performance
- Handle timezone differences across calendars
- Consider rate limits for external APIs
